## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="specification.html#directory-structure"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Directory structure</span>

<span data-as="p">A skill is a directory containing, at minimum, a
`SKILL.md` file:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="7" language="text">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
skill-name/
├── SKILL.md          # Required: metadata + instructions
├── scripts/          # Optional: executable code
├── references/       # Optional: documentation
├── assets/           # Optional: templates, resources
└── ...               # Any additional files or directories
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="specification.html#skill-md-format"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">`SKILL.md` format</span>

<span data-as="p">The `SKILL.md` file must contain YAML frontmatter
followed by Markdown content.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="specification.html#frontmatter"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Frontmatter</span>

<div class="[--page-padding:20px] overflow-x-auto flex w-[calc(100%+(var(--page-padding)*2))] my-[1em] py-[1em] -mx-[var(--page-padding)] max-w-none [contain:inline-size]"
table-wrapper="true">

<div class="px-[var(--page-padding)] grow max-w-none table">

| Field | Required | Constraints |
|----|----|----|
| `name` | Yes | Max 64 characters. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Must not start or end with a hyphen. |
| `description` | Yes | Max 1024 characters. Non-empty. Describes what the skill does and when to use it. |
| `license` | No | License name or reference to a bundled license file. |
| `compatibility` | No | Max 500 characters. Indicates environment requirements (intended product, system packages, network access, etc.). |
| `metadata` | No | Arbitrary key-value mapping for additional metadata. |
| `allowed-tools` | No | Space-separated string of pre-approved tools the skill may use. (Experimental) |

</div>

</div>

<div class="card block font-normal group relative my-2 ring-2 ring-transparent rounded-2xl bg-white dark:bg-background-dark border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 overflow-hidden w-full">

<div class="px-6 py-5 relative" component-part="card-content-container">

<div class="w-full">

## 

<div class="prose mt-1 font-normal text-base leading-6 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300"
component-part="card-content">

<span data-as="p">**Minimal example:**</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark p-0.5"
numberoflines="4" language="markdown">

<div class="flex text-gray-400 text-xs rounded-t-[14px] leading-6 font-medium pl-4 pr-2.5 py-1"
component-part="code-block-header">

<div class="flex-grow-0 flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 min-w-0"
component-part="code-block-header-filename">

<span class="truncate min-w-0" title="SKILL.md">SKILL.md</span>

</div>

<div class="flex-1 flex items-center justify-end gap-1.5 print:hidden">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
---
name: skill-name
description: A description of what this skill does and when to use it.
---
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">**Example with optional fields:**</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark p-0.5"
numberoflines="8" language="markdown">

<div class="flex text-gray-400 text-xs rounded-t-[14px] leading-6 font-medium pl-4 pr-2.5 py-1"
component-part="code-block-header">

<div class="flex-grow-0 flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 min-w-0"
component-part="code-block-header-filename">

<span class="truncate min-w-0" title="SKILL.md">SKILL.md</span>

</div>

<div class="flex-1 flex items-center justify-end gap-1.5 print:hidden">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
---
name: pdf-processing
description: Extract PDF text, fill forms, merge files. Use when handling PDFs.
license: Apache-2.0
metadata:
  author: example-org
  version: "1.0"
---
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

#### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="specification.html#name-field"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">`name` field</span>

<span data-as="p">The required `name` field:</span>

- Must be 1-64 characters
- May only contain unicode lowercase alphanumeric characters (`a-z`) and
  hyphens (`-`)
- Must not start or end with a hyphen (`-`)
- Must not contain consecutive hyphens (`--`)
- Must match the parent directory name

<div class="card block font-normal group relative my-2 ring-2 ring-transparent rounded-2xl bg-white dark:bg-background-dark border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 overflow-hidden w-full">

<div class="px-6 py-5 relative" component-part="card-content-container">

<div class="w-full">

component-part="card-content">

class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

``` shiki
name: -pdf  # cannot start with hyphen
```

</div>

</div>

style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

#### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="specification.html#description-field"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">`description` field</span>

<span data-as="p">The required `description` field:</span>

- Must be 1-1024 characters
- Should describe both what the skill does and when to use it
- Should include specific keywords that help agents identify relevant
  tasks

<div class="card block font-normal group relative my-2 ring-2 ring-transparent rounded-2xl bg-white dark:bg-background-dark border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 overflow-hidden w-full">

<div class="px-6 py-5 relative" component-part="card-content-container">

<div class="w-full">

## 

<div class="prose mt-1 font-normal text-base leading-6 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300"
component-part="card-content">

<span data-as="p">**Good example:**</span>

``` shiki
description: Extracts text and tables from PDF files, fills PDF forms, and merges multiple PDFs. Use when working with PDF documents or when the user mentions PDFs, forms, or document extraction.
```

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">`license` field</span>

<span data-as="p">The optional `license` field:</span>

- Specifies the license applied to the skill
- We recommend keeping it short (either the name of a license or the
  name of a bundled license file)

<div class="card block font-normal group relative my-2 ring-2 ring-transparent rounded-2xl bg-white dark:bg-background-dark border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 overflow-hidden w-full">

<div class="px-6 py-5 relative" component-part="card-content-container">

<div class="w-full">

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="specification.html#compatibility-field"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">`compatibility` field</span>

<span data-as="p">The optional `compatibility` field:</span>

- Must be 1-500 characters if provided
- Should only be included if your skill has specific environment
  requirements
- Can indicate intended product, required system packages, network
  access needs, etc.

<div class="card block font-normal group relative my-2 ring-2 ring-transparent rounded-2xl bg-white dark:bg-background-dark border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 overflow-hidden w-full">

<div class="px-6 py-5 relative" component-part="card-content-container">

<div class="w-full">

component-part="card-content">

style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"


</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">Most skills do not need the `compatibility`
field.</span>

</div>

</div>

#### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="specification.html#metadata-field"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">`metadata` field</span>

<span data-as="p">The optional `metadata` field:</span>

- A map from string keys to string values
- Clients can use this to store additional properties not defined by the
  Agent Skills spec
- We recommend making your key names reasonably unique to avoid
  accidental conflicts

<div class="card block font-normal group relative my-2 ring-2 ring-transparent rounded-2xl bg-white dark:bg-background-dark border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 overflow-hidden w-full">

<div class="px-6 py-5 relative" component-part="card-content-container">

<div class="w-full">

## 

<div class="prose mt-1 font-normal text-base leading-6 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300"
component-part="card-content">

<span data-as="p">**Example:**</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="3" language="yaml">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
metadata:
  author: example-org
  version: "1.0"
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

#### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="specification.html#allowed-tools-field"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">`allowed-tools` field</span>

<span data-as="p">The optional `allowed-tools` field:</span>

- A space-separated string of tools that are pre-approved to run
- Experimental. Support for this field may vary between agent
  implementations

<div class="card block font-normal group relative my-2 ring-2 ring-transparent rounded-2xl bg-white dark:bg-background-dark border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 overflow-hidden w-full">

<div class="px-6 py-5 relative" component-part="card-content-container">

<div class="w-full">

## 

<div class="prose mt-1 font-normal text-base leading-6 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300"
component-part="card-content">

<span data-as="p">**Example:**</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="yaml">

floating-buttons="true">

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

``` shiki
allowed-tools: Bash(git:*) Bash(jq:*) Read
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="specification.html#body-content"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Body content</span>

<span data-as="p">The Markdown body after the frontmatter contains the
skill instructions. There are no format restrictions. Write whatever
helps agents perform the task effectively.</span>
<span data-as="p">Recommended sections:</span>

- Step-by-step instructions
- Examples of inputs and outputs
- Common edge cases

<span data-as="p">Note that the agent will load this entire file once
it’s decided to activate a skill. Consider splitting longer `SKILL.md`
content into referenced files.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="specification.html#optional-directories"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Optional directories</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="specification.html#scripts/"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">`scripts/`</span>

<span data-as="p">Contains executable code that agents can run. Scripts
should:</span>

- Be self-contained or clearly document dependencies
- Include helpful error messages
- Handle edge cases gracefully

<span data-as="p">Supported languages depend on the agent
implementation. Common options include Python, Bash, and
JavaScript.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="specification.html#references/"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">`references/`</span>

<span data-as="p">Contains additional documentation that agents can read
when needed:</span>

- `REFERENCE.md` - Detailed technical reference
- `FORMS.md` - Form templates or structured data formats
- Domain-specific files (`finance.md`, `legal.md`, etc.)

<span data-as="p">Keep individual
<a href="specification.html#file-references" class="link">reference
files</a> focused. Agents load these on demand, so smaller files mean
less use of context.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="specification.html#assets/"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">`assets/`</span>

<span data-as="p">Contains static resources:</span>

- Templates (document templates, configuration templates)
- Images (diagrams, examples)
- Data files (lookup tables, schemas)

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="specification.html#progressive-disclosure"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Progressive disclosure</span>

<span data-as="p">Skills should be structured for efficient use of
context:</span>

1.  **Metadata** (~100 tokens): The `name` and `description` fields are
    loaded at startup for all skills
2.  **Instructions** (\< 5000 tokens recommended): The full `SKILL.md`
    body is loaded when the skill is activated
3.  **Resources** (as needed): Files (e.g. those in `scripts/`,
    `references/`, or `assets/`) are loaded only when required

<span data-as="p">Keep your main `SKILL.md` under 500 lines. Move
detailed reference material to separate files.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="specification.html#file-references"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">File references</span>

<span data-as="p">When referencing other files in your skill, use
relative paths from the skill root:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark p-0.5"
numberoflines="4" language="markdown">

<div class="flex text-gray-400 text-xs rounded-t-[14px] leading-6 font-medium pl-4 pr-2.5 py-1"
component-part="code-block-header">

<div class="flex-grow-0 flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 min-w-0"
component-part="code-block-header-filename">

<span class="truncate min-w-0" title="SKILL.md">SKILL.md</span>

</div>

<div class="flex-1 flex items-center justify-end gap-1.5 print:hidden">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
See [the reference guide](references/REFERENCE.md) for details.

Run the extraction script:
scripts/extract.py
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Keep file references one level deep from `SKILL.md`.
Avoid deeply nested reference chains.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="specification.html#validation"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Validation</span>

<span data-as="p">Use the <a
href="https://github.com/agentskills/agentskills/tree/main/skills-ref"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">skills-ref</a> reference
library to validate your skills:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
skills-ref validate ./my-skill
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">This checks that your `SKILL.md` frontmatter is valid
and follows all naming conventions.</span>

</div>

class="px-0.5 flex items-center text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-200">

<div class="flex flex-col w-full rounded-2xl pointer-events-auto bg-background-light/90 dark:bg-background-dark/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/30 focus-within:border-primary dark:focus-within:border-primary-light transition-colors">

class="lucide lucide-arrow-up text-white dark:text-white size-3.5" />

<div class="sm:flex">

<a
href="https://www.mintlify.com?utm_campaign=poweredBy&amp;utm_medium=referral&amp;utm_source=agent-skills"
class="group flex items-baseline gap-1 text-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-600 dark:hover:text-gray-300 text-nowrap"
target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><span>Powered by</span><img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="h-3.5 w-auto translate-y-[3px]" /><span class="sr-only">This

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="sticky shrink-0 z-[22] bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark mt-[var(--banner-height,0px)] top-[var(--banner-height,0px)] h-[calc(100vh-var(--banner-height,0px))] max-lg:hidden print:hidden"
style="width:var(--assistant-sheet-width, 0px);overflow:hidden">

<div class="absolute left-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-px z-10 cursor-col-resize after:content-[""] after:absolute after:inset-y-0 after:-inset-x-2 after:select-none bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-200 dark:hover:bg-gray-700">

</div>

<div id="chat-assistant-sheet"
class="flex flex-col overflow-hidden shrink-0 relative h-full bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark chat-assistant-sheet"
aria-hidden="true">

<div class="w-full flex flex-col flex-1 min-h-0 lg:pt-3">

<div class="chat-assistant-sheet-header flex items-center justify-between pb-3 px-4">

<div class="flex items-center gap-2">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-5 text-primary dark:text-primary-light" /><span class="font-medium text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100">Assistant</span>

</div>

<div class="flex items-center gap-1">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="lucide lucide-maximize2 size-4 sm:size-3.5 text-gray-500 group-hover:text-gray-700 dark:group-hover:text-gray-300" />

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="lucide lucide-x size-[20px] sm:size-4 text-gray-500 group-hover:text-gray-700 dark:group-hover:text-gray-300" />

</div>

</div>

<div id="chat-content"
class="chat-assistant-sheet-content flex flex-col-reverse flex-1 overflow-y-auto relative px-5 min-h-0">

<div class="flex-grow">

</div>

<div class="h-full flex flex-col justify-between">

<div class="mt-4 flex flex-col items-center text-sm">

<div class="mx-8 text-center text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-600 text-xs chat-assistant-disclaimer-text">

Responses are generated using AI and may contain mistakes.

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="h-px w-full shrink-0">

</div>

</div>

<div class="px-4 pb-4 shrink-0">

<div>

<div class="flex flex-col w-full rounded-2xl pointer-events-auto bg-background-light/90 dark:bg-background-dark/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/30 focus-within:border-primary dark:focus-within:border-primary-light transition-colors">

<div class="relative flex items-end">

</div>

<div class="flex items-center justify-between px-2 pb-2">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-3.5" />

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="lucide lucide-arrow-up text-white dark:text-white size-3.5" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>
